name: This Creepy Little Punk
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>舞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い<ruby lang="jp"><rb>戻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もど</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>った<ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しに</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
(This card is always treated as an "Infernity" card.)
Special Summon 1 of your "Infernity" monsters that is banished, or in your hand or GY. If a face-up "Infernity" monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle, or leaves the field because of an opponent's card effect, while this card is in your GY: You can Set this card. You can only use each effect of "This Creepy Little Punk" once per turn.

action: Activates if other cards leave the field
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
